body:
Vertical mesh stretching options. Apply simple type verification tests
Update documentation to reflect changes in domain interface.
Updates Project to use ClimaCore v0.8.0
	modified:   ../src/Domains/Domains.jl
	modified:   ../src/Domains/domain.jl
	modified:   ../src/Domains/make_function_space.jl
	modified:   test_domains.jl

Upcoming changes: Update `ekman` example to use stretching. 

Closes #236
title: Update domain and function space interface to support stretching
